creator: bitbucket63-it@yahoo.com
text:
The links for browsing ports by category on the website at freebsd.org/ports are missing. You can search for ports, which works as it did before, but clicking on a category link from the search results leads to a page not found error.

For example www.freebsd.org/ports/finance

I have tried this on the following platforms:
MacOS 10.13.6 - Safari
MacOS 10.13.6 - Vivaldi
FreeBSD 12.2-RELEASE-p2 - Iridium
